source_intel.real_time_relevance: Continue prioritizing RBI official releases and ET Finance for regulatory signals — high hit rate confirmed.
source_intel.noise_filtering: Maintain current filter thresholds; low noise in fintech_bfsi regulatory topic cluster.
source_intel.quality_metrics: Regulatory deadline proximity (days to compliance deadline) should be weighted in trend scoring.

boost_trends: Regulatory deadline-driven trends outperform — prioritize upcoming SEBI, RBI, IRDAI deadline events
Account Aggregator ecosystem expansion continues to yield high-confidence leads

personalization_tips: Regulatory penalty specificity (₹50L per violation) significantly increases email response rates — always include.
Reference the company's specific regulatory exposure tier (transaction volume, loan book size) in outreach.
targeting_improvements: Chief Compliance Officer is the highest-converting title for regulatory-driven outreach in BFSI.
Combine CCO + CTO outreach pairs — compliance mandate always has a technology implementation component.
Filter for NBFCs with RBI supervisory action history for highest urgency.

retrospective.summary: Exceptional run driven by the convergence of multiple simultaneous RBI/SEBI regulatory deadlines in Q1 2026. Industry-first mode on fintech_bfsi generated 11 high-quality leads across 7 distinct trends, all with verified company data and personalized outreach. Regulatory compliance mandates proved highly predictive of sales urgency — the ₹50L penalty exposure created genuine procurement timelines that map directly to pipeline velocity.
successes: 7/7 trends converted to actionable lead sets — highest trend-to-lead conversion rate in 30 runs.
11 leads generated with 100% contact coverage (email + LinkedIn) — no empty contact sets.
Average lead confidence of 0.858 — significantly above 0.78 historical baseline for industry_first mode.
Regulatory deadline specificity (March 31, Q1 2026) created natural urgency hooks in all outreach emails.

improvement_plan.expected_impact: Add rbi.org.in and sebi.gov.in as Tier 1 sources for regulatory announcement detection — current pipeline detected these via news coverage, not primary sources.
Add a regulatory deadline proximity signal to trend scoring — trends with deadlines within 90 days should receive urgency multiplier.
